PKG Header Hex With Offsets
---
Base offset: 0x1000

0x0000: 06 66 B8 06 00 00 00 66 50 66 68 E7 2D 00 00 66 
0x0010: 68 60 3C 00 00 66 E8 03 10 00 00 66 83 C4 0C 66 
0x0020: BA 60 3C 00 00 66 52 66 68 0E 2E 00 00 66 E8 05 
0x0030: 10 00 00 66 59 66 5B E9 D4 00 66 31 C0 67 66 83 
0x0040: 7C 24 04 00 0F 84 CA 00 66 B8 2C 2E 00 00 66 E8 
0x0050: 72 FB FF FF 67 66 8B 44 24 04 67 66 89 04 24 66 
0x0060: BB 80 2E 00 00 66 31 F6 67 66 8B 04 24 67 66 8B 
0x0070: 3C B0 66 31 ED 67 66 0F B6 03 66 39 F0 7C 0D 75 
0x0080: 18 67 66 0F B6 43 01 66 39 E8 7D 0D 66 83 C3 02 
0x0090: 66 43 67 80 7B FF 00 75 F7 66 F7 C7 01 00 00 00 
0x00A0: 74 49 67 66 0F B6 03 66 39 F0 75 2B 67 66 0F B6 
0x00B0: 43 01 66 39 E8 75 20 67 80 7B 02 00 74 19 67 66 
0x00C0: 8D 43 02 66 50 66 68 71 2E 00 00 66 E8 67 0F 00 
0x00D0: 00 66 58 66 5A EB 14 66 55 66 56 66 68 75 2E 00 
0x00E0: 00 66 E8 51 0F 00 00 66 83 C4 0C 66 D1 EF 66 45 
0x00F0: 66 83 FD 20 0F 85 7D FF 66 46 66 83 FE 13 0F 85
